case_title: ETHAN CREPS VS. TRUCO MARINE, LLC, AKA PATRIOT HOLDINGS, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX-PARTE APPLICATION FOR AN ORDER PERMITTING HIM TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO SUBSTITUTE DEFENDANTS' TRUE NAMES FOR FICTITIOUS NAMES
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT PER ORDER DEFENDANT SUED HEREIN AS DOE 1 TO BE AMERICAN SHIP MANAGEMENT, LLC DEFENDANT SUED HEREIN AS DOE 2 TO BE PATRIOT MARITIME COMPLIANCE, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT TRUCO MARINE, LLC ("TRUCO"), AMERICAN SHIP MANAGEMENT, LLC, PATRIOT MARITIME COMPLIANCE, LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS CONTINUED FROM AUG-24-2012 TO AT SEP-28-2012, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES.
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TRUE MARINE, LLC AMERICAN SHIP MANAGEMENT, LLC PATRIOT MARITIME COMPLIANCE, LLC
SEPARATE STATEMENT OF FACTS IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TRUE MARINE, LLC AMERICAN SHIP MANAGEMENT, LLC PATRIOT MARITIME COMPLIANCE, LLC
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-22-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO CONT TRIAL DATE (AMENDED); STIP FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREPS, ETHAN

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER ARGUMENTS, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS TRUE MARINE, LLC, AMERICAN SHIP MANAGEMENT, LLC & PATRIOT MARITIME COMPLIANCE, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. DEFENDANTS FAIL TO SHOW THAT THEY WERE OPERATING THE HAYES AS AGENTS OF THE UNITED STATES UNDER THE SIAA AND PVA. DEFENDANTS HAVE FAILED TO SHIFT THEIR BURDEN ON THIS DEFENSE. SEE EVIDENCE CITED BY PLAINTIFF IN OPPOSITION TO UMF 4, 5, 6, 7 AND 23. FURTHER, THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT REGARDING WHETHER DEFENDANTS WERE PLAINTIFF'S EMPLOYER. A SEAMAN MAY HAVE MORE THAN ONE EMPLOYER. SEE GUIDRY V. SOUTH LOUISIANA CONTRACTORS, INC., 614 F.2D 447, 452 (5TH CIR. 1980). PLAINTIFF'S AFFIDAVIT (HILLSMAN DECLARATION, EX. A) AND ATTACHMENTS SHOW THAT "PATRIOT" WAS THE EMPLOYER ON THE DISPATCH. "PATRIOT" IS A VAGUE REFERENCE THAT COULD REFER TO PCS OR PMC. EX. 2 TO KREPS' AFFIDAVIT SHOWS THAT ASM ISSUED THE CHECKS. AT UMF 7, DEFENDANTS CONCEDE THAT PCS, TRUCO, PMC, AND ASM ARE ALL AFFILIATED ENTITIES THAT PERFORM SEPARATE BUSINESS FUNCTIONS. THEY ALL SHARE THE SAME OFFICE. IN SHORT, THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT REGARDING THE RELATIONSHIP AMONG THE ENTITIES, THEIR RELATIONSHIP WITH PLAINTIFF, AND WHETHER ANY CAN BE CONSIDERED PLAINTIFF'S EMPLOYER OR GOVERNMENT AGENTS FOR IMMUNITY UNDER THE SIAA AND PVA. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
